These days, many kids learn piano, violin, painting, dancing, judo, mixed martial arts and Japanese. I honestly don't know how they juggle these activities and schoolwork. Some of their parents have to go to work every day so they find it hard to juggle work with family life. Perhaps they wanna juggle their kids' interest and see which one they have a talent for or can cultivate an interest in. Sometimes I wonder if the children are truly enjoying their activities.

I think you're quite adventurous like me. I went skydiving twice in Macau. The Top of Macau Tower is the highest place in Macau. This tower is taller than any buildings in Macau. Right before I jumped out of the helicopter, I was nervous and a little scared. All the buildings and hotels including The Parisian Macao looked so short. When I was falling, it was both surreal and absolutely exhilarating. Do you like roller coasters? The most exciting roller coasters are in Fuji-Q Highland in Tokyo. Three of its roller coasters broke the Guinness world records. The feelings before I did a skydive were different than those before I went on the roller coasters in Tokyo. Immediately before I rode those roller coasters, I felt absolutely exhilarated while right before I skydived, I felt nervous and a little frightened but of course, skydiving was a thrilling experience. Some people are crazy about skydiving, whether they jumped from the top of a tower or out of the helicopter. I'd love to go bungee jumping one day. It'd be a once in a lifetime experience.
